text:
Perfect! I've added validation to prevent swapping the same token to itself:

**Changes made:**

1. **Validation in executeSwap** - Checks if you're trying to swap the same token on the same chain and shows an error

2. **Validation in fetchQuote** - Prevents fetching a quote when the same token is selected (clears the quote and amount)

3. **Visual warning** - Shows a red warning card when you select the same token: "Cannot swap the same token to itself. Please select a different token."

4. **Disabled swap button** - The swap button is now disabled when the same token is selected

Now when you select the same token on both sides:
- No quote will be fetched
- A warning message appears
- The swap button is disabled
- If you somehow try to swap anyway, it will show an error

Make sure you select **different tokens** or **different chains** for your swap to work!
